name: SBI SimplyCLICK Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.category: Partner online stores (Amazon, Cleartrip, Lenskart, Netmeds)
categoryRates.description: 10X Reward Points on partner online stores (10 RP per ₹100)
5X Reward Points on all other online transactions (5 RP per ₹100)
1 Reward Point per ₹100 on all offline/POS transactions

redemptionOptions: Gift vouchers from SBI Card catalogue

welcomeBenefits.condition: On card activation and first transaction

additionalBenefits: 10X rewards on popular e-commerce partners including Amazon
Easy reward redemption on Amazon Pay
EMI conversion facility on large purchases
pros: 10X rewards on Amazon and other popular partners is excellent value
5X rewards on all online spends is strong for the fee range
Low annual fee of ₹499 with easy ₹1 lakh waiver threshold
Welcome benefit covers the entire first-year fee
cons: Only 1 RP per ₹100 on offline spends — poor for POS transactions
Reward point value of ₹0.25 is relatively low
3.5% foreign currency markup makes it poor for international use
idealFor: Frequent Amazon shoppers who want to maximize online rewards
Users who predominantly shop online and want a low-fee rewards card
Budget-conscious spenders looking for strong partner-based accelerated rewards

faqs.question: Which partner stores give 10X reward points?
faqs.answer: You earn 10X Reward Points on purchases from Amazon, Cleartrip, Lenskart, and Netmeds. The list of partners may be updated by SBI Card from time to time.

faqs.question: Can I redeem reward points on Amazon?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can convert your Reward Points into Amazon Pay balance for seamless redemption. 1 RP = ₹0.25 in Amazon Pay balance.

faqs.question: What is the annual fee waiver condition?
faqs.answer: The ₹499 annual fee is waived if your annual spends exceed ₹1,00,000 in the previous year.

faqs.question: Do I earn 5X on all online transactions?
faqs.answer: Yes, all online transactions that are not on partner stores earn 5X Reward Points. Partner store transactions earn 10X. Excluded categories like wallet loading and rent payments do not earn accelerated rewards.
